text_block_list.name: @RacingEnthusiast
text_block_list.text:
I predict T.M. Opera O will win the Japan Cup
again! There's no doubt in my mind!

text_block_list.name: @TeamDotoForever
text_block_list.text:
I hope Doto does well. I really wanna see her give
Opera O a run for her money!

text_block_list.name: @Dashmachine
text_block_list.text:
A new generation's on the rise! C'mon, it's
obvious Air Shakur is gonna win!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Everyone has their eyes on the Japan Cup today,
and every social media outlet is filled with posts
about it. There's a good amount of support for
Shakur too.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm hardly cognizant of all that, however, because
my attention is on something else entirely.
choice_data_list:
(I'm still not getting any new data on her
physical condition.)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The app Air Shakur installed on my phone is
supposed to send me updates from the body
composition monitor and fitness trackers she
uses.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'd been using it to keep track of the daily
changes in her condition, but I haven't received
any updates lately.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I spoke with her the moment I realized something
was up, but...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I changed fitness trackers, and they're not synced
to the app yet. I'll update everything after the
Japan Cup.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I'll monitor everything myself until then, so you
just focus on your admin work.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her tone made it clear she wasn't looking for
questions or requests, so I decided to trust her
and do as she asked.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I look at Air Shakur now in her racewear, I
can't ignore the subtle waves of unease roiling off
her.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I wasn't able to meet the target numbers I needed
to win, but that's no surprise. Those numbers were
absurdly high.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
But I at least got to the point where I won't be
completely trounced. I made that happen. I can
hold my own. I should be fine...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Maybe I should go over the data on my
opponents again. The best way to get on that
scoreboard should be to—

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: What? What's with you today?
choice_data_list:
Why are you talking like you're expecting to
lose?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: That's not it. I'm just...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: I gotta go. Later.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She was on edge before the Derby too, but things
feel different this time. The gloom bubbling inside
her is new, and...
choice_data_list: (How could I not have noticed?! I'm so stupid!)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
All I can do is pray that she manages to shake
that darkness off...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Welcome, Shakur, to my stage! Welcome to my
performance!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: W-welcome!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
"Your" stage, huh? Hah, guess they don't call you
the Overlord for nothin'.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I don't remember gettin' invited, though. I'm just
a party crasher, if anything.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I get that feeling too. You seem more like a
guest than anything today.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Oh yeah?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
After all, can an actor without spirit truly be said
to be on the stage?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Imagine! You, Shakur, the accomplished star of
your generation, enters the stage and I meet your
violent pursuit with grace!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Alas, it appears such a dramatic turn of events is
not to be. I'm afraid that role must go to an
understudy.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Doto, if you would please do the honors?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Yes, ma'am!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Oh, um, but... I think you're really amazing too,
Shakur!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
You're so smart and you're always thinking of
ways to win...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I, um, hope we have a good race today!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: (You're wrong, Doto... I'm nothing like you two.)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
(The data's made that clear. I know I can't catch
up to you, so what am I supposed to do about
that?!)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: "Your fate has already changed."

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
But what if there's still only one outcome for me,
despite that?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Dammit! What am I so scared for? Even if that's
the case...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: I have no choice but to run toward it!
